title: Add a task to Cirrus gating to build w/o Varlink
body: We had a regression on master where we broke the build for non-Varlink builds. Catch this in CI in the future.

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
If all goes well, this should fail the gating test, as master is broken right now
Hm. The gating test passed. That means it's not working as intended. Looking into it.
It would help if I tested locally... those build tags pass fine on my system.
Aha! We need a make clean first.
It fails now, confirming what we know - master is broken. So it seems to be working.
Will rebase once #2465 lands and fixes the build in master, then we can merge

Rebased, should pass now
@rhatdan @baude @vrothberg Someone mind giving this a final LGTM?
